deltas.description: Cow-class LER right-compose (LocalToParent × worldRoot with scale -1,-1,1) for flat quadruped root siblings; not hoglin/ravager default (worldRoot × LocalToParent). Parity emit passes officialJvmName into ApplyGeometryIrParityLivingEntityRendererPreviewBasis.

Composed-flat factory: body Rx(π/2)+T(0,10,0) with head/legs as root siblings (suspectedFlatNestedPartCount:4). Shards referenceWorldPoseMatch ok; manual Explore § A.4 after LER policy (quadruped regression section).
